settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your preferences and account settings
settings.publicProfileDesc: Allow other users to see your profile
settings.showEmailDesc: Make your email visible to other users
settings.showProgressDesc: Display your progress on the public ranking
settings.twoFactorAuthDesc: Add an extra layer of security to your account
settings.twoFactorSetupInstructions: Scan the QR code below using your authenticator app (such as Google Authenticator or Authy) or enter the manual key.
settings.twoFactorBackupIntro: Save these backup codes in a safe place. Each code can only be used once if you lose access to your authenticator device.
settings.twoFactorDisableConfirmText: To confirm disabling two-factor authentication, enter your password and the current code from the authenticator app or a backup code.

trail.title: Study Trail
trail.selectTrail: Select a trail to view its phases.
trail.noPhases: No phases registered in this trail yet.
trail.phasesWillAppear: Phases will appear here when created.
trail.guideSubtitle: Learn how our gamified study platform works!
trail.guideTrailIntro: Your learning journey is organized into a linear knowledge trail, where you progress step by step.
trail.guideStatusLockedDesc: Future phases that you cannot access yet. They stay gray with a lock icon until you complete all previous phases.
trail.guideStatusAvailableDesc: The current phase where you should play! Marked with a shining star (★), ready for you to start.
trail.guideStatusCompletedDesc: Phases you have successfully finished. They turn green with a checkmark (✓). You can play them again at any time to review!
trail.guideTypeBookDesc: Theoretical phases where you read clear and objective explanations about the subject. Great to study before challenges!
trail.guideTypeQuizDesc: Practical tests with multiple-choice questions. Test your knowledge and earn coins and XP!
trail.guideGameIntro: Study by playing like in an RPG! Here is how the resource system and your hero's evolution work on the platform:
trail.guideGameLivesDesc: You start each Quiz with lives. Incorrect answers consume 1 life. If you run out of lives, you must restart the quiz to complete it!
trail.guideGameCoinsDesc: Your gold reward! Earn coins by getting consecutive questions right and completing phases on the trail.
trail.guideGameXpDesc: Experience points earned from correct answers. Accumulate XP to level up your account!
trail.guideGameCharDesc: Your chosen hero (Warrior, Mage, or Samurai) is displayed on your current phase and physically walks along the trail as you progress!
trail.guideTipsIntro: Become a legendary student and dominate the leaderboard with these simple strategies:
trail.guideTipsRankingDesc: Level up to climb the global leaderboard. Show everyone that you are the study master!
trail.guideTipsReviewDesc: Playing completed phases does not consume lives and helps you retain and consolidate knowledge before your real tests.
trail.guideTipsReadDesc: Always read the Content (📖) phases before starting the related Quizzes (❓) to guarantee excellent grades.

contact.orContact: Or contact us directly by email:
contact.success: Message sent successfully! We will get in touch soon.
contact.error: Error sending message. Please try again.
contact.connectionError: Connection error. Check your internet connection and try again.

faq.whatIsAnswer: Our platform is an interactive learning environment that uses game elements, such as points, achievements, and challenges, to motivate students to learn. Teachers create personalized trails to engage students.
faq.howCreateAnswer: Teachers have access to an exclusive panel where they can create learning modules, add activities, videos, quizzes, and configure difficulty levels. Trails can be adapted for different objectives and teaching styles.
faq.rewardsAnswer: Yes! Students earn points by completing activities, can unlock achievements, and advance in a level system. This encourages them to continue learning while having fun.
faq.subjectsAnswer: The platform supports any subject! Teachers can create trails in mathematics, sciences, languages, history, among others. The content is fully customizable.
faq.payment: Is it necessary to pay to use the platform?
faq.paymentAnswer: The platform has a free plan with basic resources and premium plans that offer additional functionalities, such as advanced reports, priority support, and personalization tools.

profile.required: Character, username, and profile picture are required!
profile.connectionError: Connection error. Check the console for more details.

accountPage.passwordMin: New password must be at least 8 characters

consultAi.aboutDesc: ConsultAi is a technology startup created at the Faculty of Technology (FATEC). Our goal is to develop innovative software solutions aimed at benefiting the community, using technology as a tool to transform lives.
consultAi.missionDesc: Facilitate access to technological solutions that promote positive social impact.
consultAi.visionDesc: To be recognized as a reference in technology for the community.
consultAi.valuesDesc: Innovation, Ethics, Collaboration and Commitment to Social Cause.
